title: Gently Roasted Saudi Arabian Buckwheat Pilaf
description: A roasted, silky, and savory Saudi Arabian dish featuring buckwheat, perfect for midnight cravings, and ovo-vegetarian friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the buckwheat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, black pepper, cumin, and paprika until the buckwheat is evenly coated.
Spread the buckwheat mixture on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a large skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize, about 8 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the beaten eggs and roasted buckwheat mixture.
Add the cooked onion and garlic mixture to the bowl and stir until everything is well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and serve hot.
